ddls:
CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injury type */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the injury (e.g., Minor, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., Ongoing, Recovered) */,
  "recovery_plan" TEXT /* Brief description of the recovery plan */,
  "recovery_progress" TEXT /* Progress of the recovery (e.g., 50% complete) */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the injury (e.g., Left Shoulder, Right Knee) */,
  "injury_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the injury (e.g., Game, Practice, Unknown) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the injury started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the injury ended */,
  "days_missed" INTEGER /* Number of days the player missed due to the injury */,
  "cash_paid" REAL /* Total cash paid to the player while injured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_injury_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_type_id") REFERENCES injury_types ("injury_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Pitcher, Catcher, Outfielder) */,
  "position_detail" TEXT /* More detailed position information (e.g., Pitcher - Starting, Outfielder - Center) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Player's contact information (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in (e.g., American, National) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in (e.g., East, Central, West) */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_contact_info" TEXT /* Team's contact information */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_types" (
  "injury_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury type */,
  "injury_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury type */,
  "commonality" TEXT /* Frequency of the injury type (e.g., Common, Rare) */,
  "recovery_time_estimation" TEXT /* Estimated recovery time for the injury type */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Common treatment options for the injury type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injury the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Direct Deposit, Check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injuries ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, player) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
